title: Users
description: Manage who can access RoseSystem and what they can do.
noAccess: You don't have access to user management.
empty.title: No users yet
empty.description: Add a teammate to give them access to RoseSystem.
roleDescription.SUPER_ADMIN: Full access across the organization, including user management.
roleDescription.ADMIN: Full data access and user management. Can delete remittances.
roleDescription.ACCOUNTANT: Create and edit clients, payers, and claims, and approve reviews. No user management; cannot delete remittances.
roleDescription.VIEWER: Read-only access to all data. Cannot make any changes.
form.title: New User
form.description: Invite a teammate and assign their role.
form.passwordHint: Min 8 characters with upper, lower, and a number. Share it securely — the user can change it later.
form.passwordWeak: Needs an uppercase letter, a lowercase letter, and a number.
edit.title: Edit User
edit.statusHint: Disabled users are signed out within 15 minutes and cannot sign in.
permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.superAdminNotice: This user is a {role} with full, unrestricted access. Per-user overrides do not apply.
permissions.hintDefault: Each permission defaults to the {role} role.
permissions.hintOverride: Set {allow} or {deny} to override it for this user only.
